summary: Frontend testing completed for UI redesign. All features working correctly: Bestsellers section removed, 6 category cards with icons displayed on homepage, category card navigation to /katalog with correct URL parameters, catalog page displays full product catalog, product detail modal shows specs for previously empty products (ob1, k1, z1, i1 all have specs now), navbar dropdown and footer links work correctly, mobile responsive design working.
passed_tests: Homepage loads without Bestsellers section ('Nejžádanější řešení' removed)
Homepage shows 6 category cards with icons in 'Naše produkty' section
Category card 'laboratorni' present with correct icon
Category card 'obchodni' present with correct icon
Category card 'prumyslove' present with correct icon
Category card 'silnicni' present with correct icon
Category card 'zdravotnicke' present with correct icon
Category card 'pokladny' present with correct icon
Clicking 'Laboratorní váhy' card navigates to /katalog?parent=vahy&sub=laboratorni
Clicking 'Zdravotnické váhy' card navigates to /katalog?parent=vahy&sub=zdravotnicke
Clicking 'Registrační pokladny' card navigates to /katalog?parent=pokladny&sub=pokladny-all
Catalog page /katalog displays full product catalog with sidebar and product grid
URL parameters work correctly - category selection persists from URL
Product ob1 (ACLAS PS1-15B) modal shows 15 rows of technical specs
Product k1 (TST28) modal shows 4 rows of technical specs
Product z1 (Kojenecká váha) modal shows 2 rows of technical specs
Product i1 (BW) modal shows 5 rows of technical specs
Navbar 'Produkty' dropdown opens and shows category links
Navbar dropdown 'Laboratorní váhy' link navigates to correct catalog URL
Navbar dropdown 'Všechny produkty' link navigates to /katalog
'Zobrazit všechny produkty' button on homepage navigates to /katalog
Footer product links navigate to correct catalog URLs
Logo link navigates from catalog back to homepage
Mobile responsive - 6 category cards display correctly on 390x844 viewport
Mobile responsive - catalog page shows mobile chip navigation
Mobile responsive - product grid displays correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign complete and tested. Homepage now shows 6 simple category cards instead of Bestsellers section. Full product catalog moved to /katalog page with URL parameter support. All 49 products have technical specs in database. Navigation between home and catalog works via navbar dropdown, footer links, category cards, and logo. Mobile responsive design working correctly.
